security.title: Security
security.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
security.signOutWarning: Changing your password signs you out of all sessions. Personal access tokens keep working.

account.title: Account
account.deleteWarning: Your account will be deactivated and anonymized, and all your access tokens will be revoked. This cannot be undone.
